jobName: Front Back Labels - 110x90mm (square corners) Front Back Labels - 90x110mm (1mm corners)
lineDescription: Front Back Labels - 110x90mm (square corners) Size: 110mm x 90mm (D0392) Material: PP Metallic Silver Print Colour: White + CMYK Provided on 76mm Cores Finishing: RENTONS PREMIUM Hand/Machine Applied: MACHINE APPLIED Supply: Inside Winding, Left Edge Leading, 3mm gap, MOD 280mm Qty: 43,500 Hope - F x 2100 + B x 2100 Courage - F x 1500 + B x 1500 Change - F x 800 + B x 800 Gratitude - F x 6600 + B x 6600 Persistence - F x 4600 + B x 4600 Legacy - F x 5400 + B x 5400 Drop Bear - Fronts Only x 1500 *** FRONT BACK ALTERNATING ON SAME ROLL *** *** PANTONE 872 C ***
